inferred.audience: Engineers and operators targeting VC-backed startups who are tired of sending 50 applications into the void. Technical, specific, ghosted out.

linkedinHeroes.rationale: Contrarian takes on startup hiring. One-sentence paragraphs, leads with numbers. Your audience forwards these DMs on Monday mornings.
Growth-hacker voice, punchy, anti-establishment. Matches your 'stop applying, start getting introduced' framing almost exactly.
Editorial depth on early-stage operator problems. The engineers you're targeting quote these essays in Slack.

xHeroes.rationale: Opens with a concrete stat or a joke, never a preamble. Aaron Levie's shape maps cleanly onto your '2 minutes, not 2 hours' thesis.
Terse, contrarian, zero corporate. Gets quoted by the exact engineers your intros flow to.
Dev-credible, specific, never shills. His replies are where your founding-engineer candidates live.
